name: Easy Onion & Herb Focaccia
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz. can refrigerated pizza crust dough, (or fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet or 12-inch pizza pan.
3. Unroll the refrigerated dough (or roll out fresh dough) and place it on the prepared baking surface.
4. Press the dough from the center outward into a 12-inch circle.
5. Brush the dough with olive oil.
6. Sprinkle chopped red onion, fresh sage, and fresh rosemary over the top of the dough.
7. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
